auth.description:
Per-URL HTTP authentication entries for downloading remote registries.
See [`auth::AuthEntry`] for the schema.

items.description:
A single entry in the `[[auth]]` array of `.weaver.toml`.

```toml
[[auth]]
url_prefix = "https://github.com/acme/"
token_env  = "ACME_GITHUB_TOKEN"

[[auth]]
url_prefix    = "https://github.com/"
token_command = ["gh", "auth", "token"]
```

Exactly one of `token`, `token_env`, or `token_command` must be specified.

name.description: Optional diagnostic name; not used for matching.

url_prefix.description: Match any URL whose string starts with this prefix. Longest prefix wins.

oneOf.description:
Literal token. Discouraged — prefer `token_env` or `token_command` so the
token does not end up committed in `.weaver.toml`.
Name of an environment variable to read at fetch time.

Argv of a helper command. Its first line of stdout is the token. This is
the standard answer for short-lived tokens (e.g. `["gh", "auth", "token"]`).

diagnostics.description: Shared diagnostic output settings (apply to all subcommands that accept them).

stdout.description: Send diagnostic output to stdout instead of stderr.

template.description: Path to the directory where the diagnostic templates are located.

advice_policies.description: Advice policies directory. Overrides the built-in default policies.

advice_preprocessor.description:
Advice preprocessor — a jq script run once over the registry data before
being passed to rego policies.

finding_filters.description:
Filters control which findings are dropped. A filter without `signal_type`
applies globally; a filter with `signal_type` applies only to that signal type.

format.description:
Format used to render the report.
Builtin formats: `json`, `yaml`, `jsonl`. Other values are template names
(e.g. `ansi` selects the ansi templates).

input_format.description: The format of the input telemetry. `text` | `json`. (Not used for OTLP.)

input_source.description: Where to read the input telemetry from. `{file path}` | `stdin` | `otlp`.

no_stats.description: Disable statistics accumulation. Useful for long-running live-check sessions.

no_stream.description: Disable stream mode. When set, the report is built up before being rendered.

output.description:
Path to the directory where the generated artifacts will be saved.
`none` disables all template output rendering.
`http` sends the report as the response to the `/stop` request on the admin port.

templates.description: Path to the directory where the templates are located.

policy.description: Shared policy settings (apply to all subcommands that accept them).

paths.description: Policy file or directory paths. Directories load all `.rego` files.

registry.description: Shared registry settings (apply to all subcommands that accept them).

follow_symlinks.description: Follow symlinks when loading the registry.

include_unreferenced.description:
Include signals and attributes from dependency registries even if
not explicitly referenced.

path.description: Local folder, Git repo URL, or Git archive URL.

FindingFilter.description:
A filter that drops findings by ID exclusion or minimum level.
Optional `signal_type` scopes the filter to a specific signal type.

exclude_samples.description:
Drop all findings for samples with these names.
For attribute samples, this matches the attribute key — e.g.
`["trace.parent_id", "trace.span_id"]` suppresses all findings
(e.g. `missing_attribute`) for those attribute keys.

min_level.description: Drop all findings below this level.

signal_type.description:
Optional signal type scope. When set, this filter only applies to
findings with a matching signal_type.

oneOf.description: Suggested change that would improve things.

LiveCheckEmitConfig.description: OTLP log emission settings for live-check.

otlp_logs.description: Enable OTLP log emission for live-check policy findings.

otlp_logs_stdout.description: Use stdout for OTLP log emission (debug mode).

admin_port.description: Port used by the HTTP admin port (endpoints: `/stop`, `/health`).

grpc_address.description: Address used by the gRPC OTLP listener.

grpc_port.description: Port used by the gRPC OTLP listener.

inactivity_timeout.description: Max inactivity time in seconds before stopping the listener.
